name: Deep OFI with Mid-Price Momentum Confirmation
hypothesis: Order Flow Imbalance (OFI) from deeper in the book (top 5 levels) is more robust than top-level OFI. Combining a z-scored deep OFI signal with a positive short-term mid-price momentum filter will improve precision by firing only when flow and price action are aligned.
mutation_note: New spec combining a deeper, more robust OFI variant (ofi_depth_5) with a momentum filter, inspired by the failure of the sparse and inconsistent ofi_proxy and the success of adding contextual filters to other signals.
